name: SCC_SLAC_SetAdditionalParameter
title: SCC_SLAC_SetAdditionalParameter
syntax: long SCC_SLAC_SetAdditionalParameter ( dword Parameter, dword ParameterValue ) // form 1
long SCC_SLAC_SetAdditionalParameter ( dword Parameter, byte ParameterValues[] ) // form 2
description: Sets an additional parameter after creating a message, thus overwriting a value predefined by the specification (DIN 70121:2014-12).

parameters.name: Parameter
parameters.description: ID number of the parameter, as denoted in the lists of optional parameters below each Create-function.

parameters.name: ParameterValue
parameters.description: Desired value of the parameter in the matching data type.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
